titleStmt.title: SII 9.325: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 325. (A.R. No. 220 of 1918.) ON THE WALL TO THE RIGHT OF THE SOUTHERN ENTRANCE INTO THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is dated the 15th year of the Hoysaṇa king Vīra-Ballāḷa, cyclic year Krōdhana, Jyēshṭha, śu. paurṇamī, Ādivāra, Sōma-grahaṇa. In A.D. 1205 (Krōdhana), which is sometimes cited as the 15th year of Ballāḷa II, Jyēshṭha Paurṇamī fell on Friday (not Sunday), 9th June; nor was there a lunar eclipse on that day. Though there was a Krōdhana in the reign of Ballāḷa III, it was not his 15th year. The Bhaṇḍāri Sōvarasa, who was the Mahāpradhāna of Padumaladēvī, the chief queen of the Hoysaḷa king, is stated to have made a grant of some land for the service of god Āhavamallēśvara of Hiriya-Kuṟuvatti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravartti hoysaṇa vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 15 neya krōdhanasaṁ
vatsarada jēṣṭa suddha paurṇnamiyādivāra sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu paṭṭamahādēvi paduma
ladēviyara mahāpradhānaṁ bhaṁḍāri sōvarasaru śrīmaddakṣiṇavāraṇāsi hiri
yakuṟuvattiya śrīyāhavamalledēvara naivēdyakke tammāḷuva guttoḷala
nāḍa cikkakuṟuvattivūriṁ mūḍalu beḷanakuṟuvadiṁ paḍuvalu guṁgaṟolada ka
lidēvara keyyiṁ teṁkalu guttoḷala dāriyiṁ mūḍaṇa sthaḷadalli śrīmadrājagu
ru lōkābharaṇadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa yere guttoḷala
gaḍibadiṁ matta 6 Ī dharmma[vaṁ Ā] nāḍarasugaḷuṁ yalli yāvuduṁ tappade pratipā
ḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī lu sahaśrakavi
Ī dharmavanaḷidavaru
karakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
